sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4041" key="a)letropo/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλε-τροπόδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, i.c. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλεκτρο-</foreign>, late name for the <sense id="n4041.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">constellation Orion</tr_>, interp. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">II Intr.Arat.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.116</biblScope> </bibl> Maass.</sense> </entryFree>
